testCases.description: setAnnotatingEnabled(false) should set currentAnnotatingEnabled to false
setAnnotatingEnabled(false) should clear debounced onSelectionChange handler
setAnnotatingEnabled(false) should reset targetToModify, currentTarget, isLeftClick, lastDownEvent to undefined
setAnnotatingEnabled(true) should re-enable annotation creation
setAnnotatingMode() should update annotatingMode to provided value
setAnnotatingMode() should default to CREATE_NEW when no value provided
setFilter() should store the filter for later use in click selection
setUser() should update currentUser for annotation creator
isAddToCurrentSelect should return true when annotatingMode is ADD_TO_CURRENT
isAddToCurrentSelect should return true on ctrlKey when allowModifierSelect and not Mac
isAddToCurrentSelect should return true on metaKey when allowModifierSelect and Mac
isAddToCurrentSelect should return false when allowModifierSelect is false
onSelectStart should return early when annotating is disabled
onSelectStart should return early when isLeftClick is false (right-click)
onSelectStart should detect modify-existing mode when ADD_TO_CURRENT and single editable selection
onSelectStart should detect modify-existing mode when REPLACE_CURRENT and single editable selection
onSelectStart should set targetToModify to existing annotation target when modifying
onSelectStart should preserve created/creator from existing target when modifying
onSelectStart should set updated date and updatedBy when modifying
onSelectStart should create new target with new UUID when not modifying
onSelectStart should set created date and creator on new target
onSelectionChange should be debounced at 10ms
onSelectionChange should return early when annotating is disabled
onSelectionChange should return early when anchorNode is null (iOS edge case)
onSelectionChange should clear currentTarget when selection is hijacked by not-annotatable element
onSelectionChange should use isRangeAnnotatable to check all selection ranges
onSelectionChange should emulate selectstart for Chrome/iOS when timeDifference < 1000 and no currentTarget
onSelectionChange should emulate selectstart for Firefox collapsed selection workaround
onSelectionChange should create new currentTarget when dragging selection back into annotatable area
onSelectionChange should handle collapsed selection by returning early
onSelectionChange should delete annotation on collapse when not in modify mode
onSelectionChange should clear selection before deleting annotation on collapse
onSelectionChange should NOT delete annotation on collapse when ADD_TO_CURRENT mode
onSelectionChange should NOT delete annotation on collapse when REPLACE_CURRENT mode
onSelectionChange should trim selection ranges to container boundaries
onSelectionChange should skip whitespace-only selections
onSelectionChange should split ranges around not-annotatable elements
onSelectionChange should detect changes by comparing range count and quote text
onSelectionChange should merge ranges with existing annotation when ADD_TO_CURRENT
onSelectionChange should update currentTarget with new selectors
onSelectionChange should call rangeToSelector for each combined range
onSelectionChange should return early when ADD_TO_CURRENT or REPLACE_CURRENT (defer to mouseup)
onSelectionChange should update existing annotation target via store.updateTarget
onSelectionChange should clear previous selection when annotation doesn't exist yet
onPointerDown should clone the pointer event to preserve target reference
onPointerDown should store cloned event in lastDownEvent
onPointerDown should set isLeftClick to true when button === 0
onPointerDown should set isLeftClick to false when button !== 0 (right-click)
onPointerUp should return early when isLeftClick is false
onPointerUp should clone the pointer event
clickSelect should handle dismissOnNotAnnotatable='ALWAYS' by clearing selection
clickSelect should call dismissOnNotAnnotatable function when provided
clickSelect should call store.getAt with correct coordinates and filter
clickSelect should pass selectionMode='all' flag to store.getAt
clickSelect should emit clickAnnotation event when annotation is clicked
clickSelect should call selection.userSelect with annotation ids
clickSelect should detect selection change by comparing current and next ids
clickSelect should clear selection when clicking empty area
onPointerUp should check timeDifference < CLICK_TIMEOUT (300ms) for click detection
onPointerUp should call pollSelectionCollapsed before processing click
onPointerUp should route to clickSelect when selection is collapsed
onPointerUp should route to clickSelect when both down and up are on not-annotatable element
onPointerUp should clear currentTarget before calling clickSelect
onPointerUp should call upsertCurrentTarget when valid selection exists
onPointerUp should call selection.userSelect after upserting target
pollSelectionCollapsed should poll isCollapsed with 1ms interval
pollSelectionCollapsed should stop after 50ms timeout
pollSelectionCollapsed should stop early when isCollapsed becomes true
onContextMenu should return early when selection is collapsed
onContextMenu should call onSelectionChange when currentTarget missing (Chrome Android workaround)
onContextMenu should return early when selection couldn't be initiated
onContextMenu should call upsertCurrentTarget
onContextMenu should call selection.userSelect with cloned event
onKeyup should return early when annotating is disabled
onKeyup should only process Shift key release
onKeyup should only process when currentTarget exists
onKeyup should only process when selection is not collapsed
onKeyup should call upsertCurrentTarget and selection.userSelect on Shift release
onSelectAll should add selectionchange event listener
onSelectAll should call onSelectStart
onSelectAll should clear selection in handler
onSelectAll should add annotation to store
onSelectAll should call selection.userSelect
onSelectAll should remove selectionchange listener after processing
SELECTION_KEYS hotkey should store lastDownEvent on non-repeat keydown
SELECTION_KEYS hotkey should ignore repeat events
SELECT_ALL hotkey should store lastDownEvent and call onSelectAll
handleArrowKeyPress should return early on repeat events
handleArrowKeyPress should return early when target is not-annotatable (except body)
handleArrowKeyPress should process when target is document.body
handleArrowKeyPress should clear currentTarget
handleArrowKeyPress should call selection.clear()
upsertCurrentTarget should add annotation when it doesn't exist
upsertCurrentTarget should add annotation with id, bodies, and target
upsertCurrentTarget should update target when currentTarget is newer
upsertCurrentTarget should update target when existing has no updated timestamp
upsertCurrentTarget should NOT update target when existing is newer
should add pointerdown listener to document
should add pointerup listener to document
should add contextmenu listener to document
should add keyup listener to container
should add selectstart listener to container
should add selectionchange listener to document
destroy should reset internal state variables to undefined
destroy should clear debounced onSelectionChange handler
destroy should remove pointerdown listener from document
destroy should remove pointerup listener from document
destroy should remove contextmenu listener from document
destroy should remove keyup listener from container
destroy should remove selectstart listener from container
destroy should remove selectionchange listener from document
destroy should unbind all hotkeys
createSelectionHandler should return object with destroy method
createSelectionHandler should return object with setFilter method
createSelectionHandler should return object with setUser method
createSelectionHandler should return object with setAnnotatingEnabled method
createSelectionHandler should return object with setAnnotatingMode method
onPointerMove should call store.getAt with relative coordinates
onPointerMove should pass currentFilter to store.getAt
onPointerMove should check evalSelectAction is not NONE before hovering
onPointerMove should add 'hovered' class and set hover state when hit found
onPointerMove should only update hover when id changes
onPointerMove should remove 'hovered' class and clear hover when no hit
onPointerMove should only clear hover when hover.current exists
should add pointermove listener to container
redraw should be debounced at 10ms
redraw should use requestAnimationFrame
redraw should call painter.clear() when painter exists
redraw should call getViewportBounds with container
redraw should call store.getIntersecting with viewport bounds
redraw should apply currentFilter to intersecting annotations
redraw should get selectedIds from selection.selected
redraw should create Highlight objects with annotation, rects, and state
redraw should set selected state based on selectedIds
redraw should set hovered state based on hover.current
redraw should call renderer.redraw with highlights, bounds, style, painter, lazy
redraw should call onDraw callback with annotations after 1ms delay
setPainter should update currentPainter
setPainter should trigger redraw
setStyle should update currentStyle
setStyle should trigger redraw
setFilter should update currentFilter
setFilter should trigger non-lazy redraw (false)
should observe store changes and trigger redraw
should subscribe to selection changes and trigger redraw
should subscribe to hover changes and trigger redraw
onScroll should trigger lazy redraw (true)
should add scroll listener to document with capture and passive
onResize should be debounced at 10ms
onResize should call store.recalculatePositions
onResize should call painter.reset when painter exists
onResize should trigger redraw
should add resize listener to window
should create ResizeObserver for container
MutationObserver callback should be debounced at 150ms
MutationObserver should detect internal mutations (target is container or descendant)
MutationObserver should trigger lazy redraw only for external mutations
MutationObserver should observe document.body
MutationObserver should use attributes, childList, subtree config
destroy should remove pointermove listener from container
destroy should call renderer.destroy()
destroy should unobserve store changes
destroy should unsubscribe from selection
destroy should unsubscribe from hover
destroy should remove scroll listener from document
destroy should remove resize listener from window
destroy should disconnect ResizeObserver
destroy should disconnect MutationObserver
createBaseRenderer should return object with destroy method
createBaseRenderer should return object with redraw method
createBaseRenderer should return object with setStyle method
createBaseRenderer should return object with setFilter method
createBaseRenderer should return object with setPainter method
createBaseRenderer should delegate setVisible to renderer.setVisible
computeZIndex should detect rect intersection correctly
computeZIndex intersects function should use proper overlap logic
computeZIndex should calculate total highlight length from all rects
computeZIndex should sort intersecting highlights by total length (descending)
computeZIndex should return index of highlight in sorted array
computeZIndex should return 0 for non-overlapping highlights
createRenderer should add r6o-annotatable class to container
createRenderer should create highlight layer div with class r6o-span-highlight-layer
createRenderer should insert highlight layer as first child of container
redraw should use dequal to detect changes between currentRendered and highlights
redraw should skip DOM redraw when noChanges and lazy is true
redraw should return early when no painter and shouldRedraw is false
redraw should clear highlightLayer innerHTML when shouldRedraw
redraw should sort highlights by creation date (oldest first)
redraw should handle missing created dates (return 0)
redraw should iterate over all highlights and their rects
redraw should compute zIndex for each rect
redraw should call paint function with highlight, bounds, style, painter, zIndex
redraw should create span element with r6o-annotation class
redraw should set data-annotation attribute to annotation id
redraw should set span position styles (left, top, width, height) from rect
redraw should set backgroundColor using getBackgroundColor(style)
redraw should set borderStyle when underlineStyle is provided
redraw should set borderColor when underlineColor is provided
redraw should set borderBottomWidth when underlineThickness is provided
redraw should set paddingBottom when underlineOffset is provided
redraw should append span to highlightLayer
redraw should update currentRendered after processing
setVisible(true) should remove hidden class from highlightLayer
setVisible(false) should add hidden class to highlightLayer
destroy should remove highlightLayer from DOM
createRenderer should return object with destroy method
createRenderer should return object with redraw method
createRenderer should return object with setVisible method
createSpansRenderer should call createBaseRenderer with container, state, viewport, and renderer
createSpansRenderer should pass createRenderer(container) as implementation
